prompt: Watercolour painting — an ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5). A small child in a yellow turban, alone and crying, lost in a vast crowded Indian village spring fair — blurred all around him are balloon-sellers, sweet-stalls, a roundabout, a snake-charmer — everything bright and overwhelming, the child tiny and frightened at the centre. Moving, glowing against a dark festive ground. Loose luminous watercolour washes, soft wet-on-wet colour bleeds, granulation and visible paper grain, glowing against the dark ground. No text, no labels.
alt: A small child alone and crying in a vast crowded village fair, balloons and sweet-stalls blurred around him
